revision.text:
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{Ambox | name = BLP primary sources | subst = {{{subst|{{subst:substcheck}}}}} | type = content | class = ambox-Primary_sources | image = [[file:Question book-new.svg|50x40px]] | sect = [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|biography of a living person]] | issue = '''relies too much on [[Wikipedia:Verifiability|references]] to [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons#Misuse of primary sources|primary sources]]'''. | fix = Please help by adding [[Wikipedia:No original research#Primary, secondary and tertiary sources|secondary or tertiary sources]]. Contentious material about living persons that is unsourced or poorly sourced '''must be removed immediately''', especially if potentially [[Wikipedia:Libel|libelous]] or harmful.{{#if:{{{find2|{{{unquoted|}}}}}}|
{{find sources mainspace|{{#if:{{{find|}}}|{{{find}}}|.}}|{{{find2|{{{unquoted|}}}}}}}} |{{#if:{{{find|}}}|{{#ifeq: {{{find|}}} |none ||
{{find sources mainspace|{{{find}}} }}}}|
{{find sources mainspace}}}}}} | removalnotice = yes | cat = Articles lacking reliable references | date = {{{date|}}} | all = All articles lacking reliable references | cat2 = BLP articles lacking sources }} }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=BLP_primary_sources here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
